inst✝³ : PartialOrder ι
inst✝² : TopologicalSpace ι

inst✝ : PseudoMetricSpace E
f : ι → E
hf : @IsCadlag ι E inst✝³ inst✝² PseudoMetricSpace.toUniformSpace.toTopologicalSpace f
s : Set ι
hs : IsCompact s
⊢ Bornology.IsBounded (f '' s)

        _ ≤ max N (Nat.ceil (‖f x‖ + ‖l‖ + 2)) := le_max_right _ _
        _ ≤ ‖g (φ (max N (Nat.ceil (‖f x‖ + ‖l‖ + 2))))‖ := by exact_mod_cast this
    have := norm_le_norm_add_norm_sub' (g (φ (max N (Nat.ceil (‖f x‖ + ‖l‖ + 2))))) (f x)
    linarith [h1]
  | inr h2 =>

by_cases he : s.Nonempty
  · obtain ⟨x, hxs⟩ := he
    have : ∀ y ∈ s, ∃ U ∈ 𝓝 y, IsBounded (f '' (s ∩ U)) := fun y _ => by
      obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf.left_limit y
      have hr := hf.right_continuous y
      have hright : ∃ V ∈ 𝓝 y, IsBounded (f '' (s ∩ Set.Ici y ∩ V)) := by
        obtain ⟨V, hV, hVbd⟩ := Metric.continuousWithinAt_iff.mp hr 1 one_pos
        refine ⟨V, hV, ?_⟩
        apply Metric.isBounded_iff.mpr
        use 2
        intro a ⟨⟨_, hay⟩, haV⟩ b ⟨⟨_, hby⟩, hbV⟩
        calc dist (f a) (f b) ≤ dist (f a) (f y) + dist (f y) (f b) := dist_triangle _ _ _
          _ < 1 + 1 := add_lt_add (hVbd ⟨hay, haV⟩) (hVbd ⟨hby, hbV⟩)
          _ = 2 := by ring
      have hleft : ∃ V ∈ 𝓝 y, IsBounded (f '' (s ∩ Set.Iio y ∩ V)) := by
        obtain ⟨V, hV, hVbd⟩ := Metric.tendsto_nhds.mp hl 1 one_pos
        refine ⟨V, mem_of_superset (Iio_mem_nhds (lt_add_one y)) (fun z hz => hV ⟨hz, hz⟩), ?_⟩
        apply Metric.isBounded_iff.mpr
        use 2
        intro a ⟨⟨_, hay⟩, haV⟩ b ⟨⟨_, hby⟩, hbV⟩
        have ha : a ∈ Set.Iio y := hay
        have hb : b ∈ Set.Iio y := hby
        calc dist (f a) (f b) ≤ dist (f a) l + dist l (f b) := dist_triangle _ _ _
          _ < 1 + 1 := add_lt_add (hVbd ⟨ha, haV⟩) (hVbd ⟨hb, hbV⟩)
          _ = 2 := by ring
      obtain ⟨V₁, hV₁, hbd₁⟩ := hright
      obtain ⟨V₂, hV₂, hbd₂⟩ := hleft
      refine ⟨V₁ ∩ V₂, Filter.inter_mem hV₁ hV₂, ?_⟩
      have hsub : f '' (s ∩ (V₁ ∩ V₂)) ⊆ f '' (s ∩ Set.Ici y ∩ V₁) ∪ f '' (s ∩ Set.Iio y ∩ V₂) := by
        intro z ⟨w, ⟨hws, hwV₁, hwV₂⟩, rfl⟩
        by_cases hwy : y ≤ w
        · left; exact ⟨w, ⟨⟨hws, hwy⟩, hwV₁⟩, rfl⟩
        · right; exact ⟨w, ⟨⟨hws, not_le.mp hwy⟩, hwV₂⟩, rfl⟩
      exact (hbd₁.union hbd₂).subset hsub
    choose U hU using this
    obtain ⟨t, hts, htfin, htcover⟩ := hs.elim_nhds_subcover U (fun y hy => (hU y hy).1)
    have : f '' s ⊆ ⋃ y ∈ t, f '' (s ∩ U y) := by
      intro z ⟨w, hws, rfl⟩
      obtain ⟨y, hyt, hwy⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion₂.mp (htcover hws)
      exact Set.mem_biUnion hyt ⟨w, ⟨hws, hwy⟩, rfl⟩
    exact (htfin.isBounded_biUnion.mpr (fun y hy => (hU y (hts hy)).2)).subset this
  · simp [Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp he]

apply hs.isBounded_of_continuousWithinAt_of_tendsto_Ioo
  · exact fun x _ => hf.right_continuous x
  · exact fun x _ => hf.left_limit x

suffices IsCompact (f '' s) from this.isBounded
  apply hs.image_of_continuousOn
  intro x _
  have hrc := hf.right_continuous x
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf.left_limit x
  rw [ContinuousWithinAt, nhdsWithin]
  rw [ContinuousWithinAt, nhdsWithin, nhds_eq_nhdsWithin_Iio_sup_nhdsWithin_Ici x] at hrc
  rw [inf_comm, inf_sup_right]
  apply Tendsto.sup
  · exact hl.mono_left (inf_le_inf_left _ (nhdsWithin_mono x (Set.Iio_subset_Iic_self)))
  · exact hrc.mono_left (inf_le_inf_left _ (nhdsWithin_mono x (Set.Ioi_subset_Ici_self)))

rcases s.eq_empty_or_nonempty with rfl | hne
  · simp
  have : ∀ x ∈ s, ∃ t ∈ 𝓝[s] x, IsBounded (f '' t) := fun x _ ↦ by
    obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf.left_limit x
    have hrc := hf.right_continuous x
    have h1 : IsBounded (f '' (Set.Ioi x)) ∩ Metric.ball (f x) 1 := isBounded_ball.subset inter_subset_right
    obtain ⟨u, hu, hfu⟩ := Metric.continuousWithinAt_iff.mp hrc 1 one_pos
    obtain ⟨v, hv, hfv⟩ := Metric.tendsto_nhds.mp hl 1 one_pos
    refine ⟨(Set.Iio x ∩ v) ∪ ({x} ∪ (Set.Ioi x ∩ u)), ?_, ?_⟩
    · rw [nhdsWithin]
      apply inter_mem_inf
      · apply IsOpen.mem_nhds
        · apply IsOpen.union
          exact isOpen_Iio.inter hv.1
          exact IsOpen.union isOpen_singleton (isOpen_Ioi.inter hu.1)
        · simp [hv.2, hu.2]
      · exact Filter.univ_mem
    · apply IsBounded.union
      · apply Metric.isBounded_iff.mpr
        use l, 2
        intro y hy
        simp only [Set.mem_image, Set.mem_inter_iff, Set.mem_Iio] at hy
        obtain ⟨z, ⟨_, hz2⟩, rfl⟩ := hy
        have := hfv hz2
        linarith [dist_nonneg (x := f z) (y := l)]
      · apply IsBounded.union
        · simp [isBounded_singleton]
        · apply Metric.isBounded_iff.mpr
          use f x, 2
          intro y hy
          simp only [Set.mem_image, Set.mem_inter_iff, Set.mem_Ioi] at hy
          obtain ⟨z, ⟨hz1, hz2⟩, rfl⟩ := hy
          have := hfu z ⟨hz1, hz2⟩
          linarith [dist_nonneg (x := f z) (y := f x)]
  exact hs.isBounded_of_forall_mem this

refine hs.isBounded_image (fun x _ => ?_)
  exact ⟨f x, hf.right_continuous x |>.tendsto⟩

apply hs.isBounded_of_locallyBounded_image
  intro x _
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf.left_limit x
  have hL := hl.isBounded_image (Metric.isBounded_closedBall (x := l) (r := 1))
    (Metric.closedBall_mem_nhds l one_pos)
  have hR := (hf.right_continuous x).isBounded_image (Metric.isBounded_closedBall (x := f x) (r := 1))
    (Metric.closedBall_mem_nhds (f x) one_pos)
  obtain ⟨W, hW, hWb⟩ := hL
  obtain ⟨V, hV, hVb⟩ := hR
  exact ⟨W ∪ V, Filter.union_mem_sup hW hV, (hWb.union hVb).subset (Set.image_union f W V ▸ le_refl _)⟩

apply hs.isBounded_of_continuousOn_isBounded
  · intro x _
    exact (hf.right_continuous x).mono (Set.Ioi_subset_Ici_self)
  · intro x _
    exact hf.left_limit x

rcases s.eq_empty_or_nonempty with rfl | hne
  · simp
  apply hs.isBounded_image
  intro x _
  exact (hf.right_continuous x).continuousAt <| mem_nhds_iff.mpr ⟨Set.Ioi x, Set.Ioi_subset_Ioi le_rfl, isOpen_Ioi, lt_add_one x⟩

by_cases hs' : s.Nonempty
  · exact hs.isBounded_of_forall_mem_nhdsWithin (hs'.image f) fun x _ => 
      ⟨Set.univ, univ_mem, (hf.right_continuous x).isBounded_image_of_tendsto_and_left_limit 
        (hf.left_limit x).choose_spec⟩
  · simp only [Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty] at hs'
    simp [hs']

rcases s.eq_empty_or_nonempty with rfl | hne
  · simp
  · have : ∀ x, ∃ t ∈ 𝓝[≥] x, IsBounded (f '' (t ∩ Set.Iic x)) ∧ IsBounded (f '' (t ∩ Set.Ici x)) := by
      intro x
      obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf.left_limit x
      have hright := hf.right_continuous x
      rw [Metric.continuousWithinAt_iff] at hright
      rw [Metric.tendsto_nhdsWithin_nhds] at hl
      obtain ⟨δ₁, hδ₁, h₁⟩ := hl 1 one_pos
      obtain ⟨δ₂, hδ₂, h₂⟩ := hright 1 one_pos
      refine ⟨Metric.ball x (min δ₁ δ₂), ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
      · exact mem_nhdsWithin_of_mem_nhds (Metric.ball_mem_nhds x (lt_min hδ₁ hδ₂))
      · apply Metric.isBounded_ball.subset
        intro y hy
        simp only [Set.mem_inter_iff, Metric.mem_ball, Set.mem_Iic] at hy
        simp only [Set.mem_image, Set.mem_inter_iff, Metric.mem_ball, Set.mem_Iic]
        refine ⟨l, ?_⟩
        cases' (em (y = x)) with heq hne
        · subst heq; exact (h₁ (lt_min hδ₁ hδ₂) (lt_irrefl _)).le
        · exact (h₁ (hy.1.trans_le (min_le_left _ _)) (lt_of_le_of_ne hy.2 hne)).le
      · apply Metric.isBounded_ball.subset
        intro y hy
        simp only [Set.mem_inter_iff, Metric.mem_ball, Set.mem_Ici] at hy
        simp only [Set.mem_image, Set.mem_inter_iff, Metric.mem_ball, Set.mem_Ici]
        refine ⟨f x, ?_⟩
        cases' (em (y = x)) with heq hne
        · subst heq; simp
        · exact (h₂ (hy.1.trans_le (min_le_right _ _)) (lt_of_le_of_ne hy.2 (Ne.symm hne))).le
    choose g hg using this
    have cover : s ⊆ ⋃ x ∈ s, g x := fun x hx => Set.mem_biUnion hx (mem_of_mem_nhdsWithin (left_mem_Ici) (hg x).1)
    obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ := hs.elim_finite_subcover_image (fun x _ => isOpen_interior) 
      (fun x hx => Set.mem_biUnion hx (interior_mem_nhds.mpr (mem_of_mem_nhdsWithin (left_mem_Ici) (hg x).1)))
    have : f '' s ⊆ ⋃ x ∈ t, f '' (g x) := by
      intro y hy
      obtain ⟨z, hz, rfl⟩ := hy
      obtain ⟨_, ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩, hz'⟩ := ht hz
      exact Set.mem_biUnion hx (Set.mem_image_of_mem f (interior_subset hz'))
    refine IsBounded.subset ?_ this
    apply Set.Finite.isBounded_biUnion ht.finite_toSet
    intro x hx
    have : f '' (g x) ⊆ f '' (g x ∩ Set.Iic x) ∪ f '' (g x ∩ Set.Ici x) := by
      intro y hy
      obtain ⟨z, hz, rfl⟩ := hy
      rcases le_or_lt z x with h | h
      · exact Or.inl ⟨z, ⟨hz, h⟩, rfl⟩
      · exact Or.inr ⟨z, ⟨hz, h.le⟩, rfl⟩
    exact ((hg x).2.1.union (hg x).2.2).subset this

apply IsCompact.isBounded_image hs
  intro x _
  exact ⟨f x, hf.right_continuous x⟩

rcases s.eq_empty_or_nonempty with rfl | hne
  · simp
  · refine hs.isBounded_image ?_
    intro x _
    have hrc := hf.right_continuous x
    have hll := hf.left_limit x
    obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hll
    rw [Metric.continuousWithinAt_iff] at hrc
    rw [Metric.tendsto_nhdsWithin_nhds] at hl
    rcases mem_nhdsWithin_Ici_iff_exists_Icc_subset.mp (hrc 1 one_pos) with ⟨b, hxb, hIcc⟩
    by_cases h : ∃ y, y < x
    · rcases hl 1 one_pos with ⟨δ, hδ, hball⟩
      have : Set.Ioo (x - δ) x ∪ Set.Icc x b ∈ 𝓝 x := by
        apply mem_nhds_iff.mpr
        refine ⟨Set.Ioo (x - δ) b, ?_, Set.isOpen_Ioo, ?_⟩
        · intro y hy
          rcases lt_trichotomy y x with hyx | rfl | hxy
          · left; exact ⟨hy.1, hyx⟩
          · right; exact ⟨le_refl x, hxb.le⟩
          · right; exact ⟨hxy.le, hy.2.le⟩
        · exact ⟨sub_lt_self x hδ, hxb⟩
      refine ⟨Set.Ioo (x - δ) x ∪ Set.Icc x b, this, ?_⟩
      rw [Metric.isBounded_image_iff]
      refine ⟨2 + dist (f x) l, ?_⟩
      intro y hy z hz
      rcases hy with hy | hy <;> rcases hz with hz | hz
      · calc dist (f y) (f z) ≤ dist (f y) l + dist (f z) l := dist_triangle_right _ _ _
          _ < 1 + 1 := add_lt_add (hball hy.2 hy.1) (hball hz.2 hz.1)
          _ ≤ 2 + dist (f x) l := by linarith
      · calc dist (f y) (f z) ≤ dist (f y) l + dist l (f x) + dist (f x) (f z) := dist_triangle4_left _ _ _ _
          _ < 1 + dist (f x) l + 1 := by linarith [hball hy.2 hy.1, hIcc hz]
          _ = 2 + dist (f x) l := by ring
      · calc dist (f y) (f z) ≤ dist (f y) (f x) + dist (f x) l + dist l (f z) := dist_triangle4_right _ _ _ _
          _ < 1 + dist (f x) l + 1 := by linarith [hIcc hy, hball hz.2 hz.1]
          _ = 2 + dist (f x) l := by ring
      · calc dist (f y) (f z) ≤ dist (f y) (f x) + dist (f x) (f z) := dist_triangle _ _ _
          _ < 1 + 1 := add_lt_add (hIcc hy) (hIcc hz)
          _ ≤ 2 + dist (f x) l := by linarith
    · push_neg at h
      refine ⟨Set.Icc x b, ?_, ?_⟩
      · exact mem_nhdsWithin_Ici_iff_exists_Icc_subset.mp (hrc 1 one_pos)
      · rw [Metric.isBounded_image_iff]
        refine ⟨2, ?_⟩
        intro y hy z hz
        calc dist (f y) (f z) ≤ dist (f y) (f x) + dist (f x) (f z) := dist_triangle _ _ _
          _ < 1 + 1 := add_lt_add (hIcc hy) (hIcc hz)
          _ = 2 := by ring

have : ∀ x, ∃ u ∈ 𝓝 x, IsBounded (f '' (s ∩ u)) := fun x => by
    have hrc := hf.right_continuous x
    have ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf.left_limit x
    have hbr : ∃ u ∈ 𝓝[≥] x, IsBounded (f '' u) := hrc.image_mem_of_isBounded isBounded_ball
    have hbl : ∃ u ∈ 𝓝[<] x, IsBounded (f '' u) := hl.image_mem_of_isBounded isBounded_ball
    obtain ⟨ur, hur, hbur⟩ := hbr
    obtain ⟨ul, hul, hbul⟩ := hbl
    refine ⟨ul ∪ ur, ?_, (hbul.union hbur).subset (Set.image_mono (Set.inter_subset_right))⟩
    rw [mem_nhdsWithin_Ici_iff_exists_Icc_subset] at hur
    rw [mem_nhdsWithin_Iio_iff_exists_Ioo_subset] at hul
    sorry
  exact hs.isBounded_of_forall_mem_nhds_isBounded_image this

rcases s.eq_empty_or_nonempty with rfl | hne
  · simp
  have : ∀ x, ∃ U ∈ 𝓝 x, IsBounded (f '' (U ∩ s)) := fun x => by
    obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf.left_limit x
    have hr := hf.right_continuous x
    have hright : ∀ᶠ y in 𝓝[≥] x, dist (f y) (f x) < 1 := by
      have : 𝓝[≥] x = 𝓝[>] x ⊔ pure x := by simp [nhdsWithin, sup_comm, ← inf_sup_left]
      rw [this, Filter.eventually_sup, Filter.eventually_pure]
      exact ⟨hr.tendsto.eventually (Metric.ball_mem_nhds _ one_pos), by simp⟩
    have hleft : ∀ᶠ y in 𝓝[<] x, dist (f y) l < 1 := hl.eventually (Metric.ball_mem_nhds _ one_pos)
    obtain ⟨U, hU, hUo, hxU, hUright, hUleft⟩ : ∃ U, U ∈ 𝓝 x ∧ IsOpen U ∧ x ∈ U ∧
        (∀ y ∈ U, x ≤ y → dist (f y) (f x) < 1) ∧ (∀ y ∈ U, y < x → dist (f y) l < 1) := by
      obtain ⟨V, hV, hVright⟩ := eventually_nhdsWithin_iff.mp hright
      obtain ⟨W, hW, hWleft⟩ := eventually_nhdsWithin_iff.mp hleft
      refine ⟨V ∩ W, Filter.inter_mem hV hW, ?_, ?_, fun y hy hxy => hVright y hy.1 hxy,
        fun y hy hxy => hWleft y hy.2 hxy⟩
      · exact IsOpen.inter (isOpen_of_mem_nhds hV) (isOpen_of_mem_nhds hW)
      · exact ⟨mem_of_mem_nhds hV, mem_of_mem_nhds hW⟩
    refine ⟨U, hU, ?_⟩
    apply isBounded_of_forall_mem_nhds_isBounded (f x)
    use Metric.ball (f x) 1 ∪ Metric.ball l 1
    exact ⟨Filter.union_mem_sup (Metric.ball_mem_nhds _ one_pos) (Metric.ball_mem_nhds _ one_pos),
      Metric.isBounded_ball.union Metric.isBounded_ball, fun y hy => by
        obtain ⟨z, hz, rfl⟩ := hy
        rcases le_or_lt x z with hxz | hzx
        · left; exact hUright z hz.1 hxz
        · right; exact hUleft z hz.1 hzx⟩
  exact hs.isBounded_of_forall_mem fun x hx => this x

rcases s.eq_empty_or_nonempty with rfl | ⟨x₀, hx₀⟩
  · simp
  · exact hs.isBounded_of_locallyBounded_nhdsWithin fun x hx => by
      obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf.left_limit x
      have hrc := hf.right_continuous x
      refine ⟨Set.Iic x ∪ Set.Ici x, ?_, ?_⟩
      · exact mem_nhdsWithin_of_mem_nhds (by simp)
      · apply IsBounded.union <;> apply Metric.isBounded_of_tendsto
        · exact hl
        · exact hrc.tendsto_nhdsWithin_Ici

simp only [Metric.isBounded_iff_subset_closedBall]
  sorry

apply hs.image_of_continuousOn.isBounded
  intro x _
  exact (hf.right_continuous x).continuousAt (Ioi_mem_nhds (lt_add_one x)) |>.continuousWithinAt

rcases s.eq_empty_or_nonempty with rfl | hne
  · simp
  · have : ∀ x ∈ s, ∃ U ∈ 𝓝 x, IsBounded (f '' (U ∩ s)) := fun x _ => by
      have hrc := hf.right_continuous x
      have ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf.left_limit x
      have h1 : ∃ U ∈ 𝓝[≥] x, IsBounded (f '' U) := by
        have := hrc.tendsto
        rw [Metric.tendsto_nhds] at this
        obtain ⟨U, hU, hUb⟩ := (this 1 one_pos).exists_mem
        exact ⟨U ∪ {x}, Filter.mem_of_superset hU (Set.subset_union_left) ,
          (Metric.isBounded_ball.subset (fun y hy => by
            rcases Set.mem_union.mp hy with h | h
            · exact le_of_lt (hUb y h)
            · simp [Set.mem_singleton_iff.mp h])).union (isBounded_singleton)⟩
      have h2 : ∃ U ∈ 𝓝[<] x, IsBounded (f '' U) := by
        rw [Metric.tendsto_nhds] at hl
        obtain ⟨U, hU, hUb⟩ := (hl 1 one_pos).exists_mem
        exact ⟨U, hU, Metric.isBounded_ball.subset (fun y hy => le_of_lt (hUb y hy))⟩
      obtain ⟨U1, hU1, hb1⟩ := h1
      obtain ⟨U2, hU2, hb2⟩ := h2
      have hU1' := mem_nhdsWithin.mp hU1
      have hU2' := mem_nhdsWithin.mp hU2
      obtain ⟨V1, hV1o, hxV1, hV1U1⟩ := hU1'
      obtain ⟨V2, hV2o, hxV2, hV2U2⟩ := hU2'
      refine ⟨V1 ∩ V2, Filter.inter_mem (hV1o.mem_nhds hxV1) (hV2o.mem_nhds hxV2), ?_⟩
      apply IsBounded.subset (hb1.union hb2)
      intro y ⟨⟨hyV1, hyV2⟩, hys⟩
      rcases lt_trichotomy y x with h | rfl | h
      · exact Set.mem_union_right _ (hV2U2 ⟨hyV2, h⟩)
      · exact Set.mem_union_left _ (hV1U1 ⟨hyV1, le_refl x⟩)
      · exact Set.mem_union_left _ (hV1U1 ⟨hyV1, le_of_lt h⟩)
    exact hs.isBounded_of_forall_mem this

rcases s.eq_empty_or_nonempty with rfl | ⟨x₀, hx₀⟩
  · simp
  · have : ContinuousOn f s := by
      intro x _
      exact (hf.right_continuous x).mono (Set.Ioi_subset_Ici_self)
    exact hs.image_of_continuousOn this |>.isBounded

have : ∀ x ∈ s, ∃ U ∈ 𝓝 x, IsBounded (f '' (s ∩ U)) := fun x _ => by
    obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf.left_limit x
    have hr := Metric.tendsto_nhds.mp (hf.right_continuous x) 1 one_pos
    have hleft := Metric.tendsto_nhds.mp hl 1 one_pos
    rw [Filter.eventually_nhdsWithin_iff] at hr hleft
    obtain ⟨V, hVmem, hV⟩ := hr.exists_mem
    obtain ⟨W, hWmem, hW⟩ := hleft.exists_mem
    refine ⟨V ∩ W, Filter.inter_mem hVmem hWmem, ?_⟩
    apply (Metric.isBounded_ball (x := f x) (r := 1)).union (Metric.isBounded_ball (x := l) (r := 1)) |>.subset
    rintro y ⟨z, ⟨hz1, hz2, hz3⟩, rfl⟩
    rcases le_or_lt x z with hle | hlt
    · rcases hle.eq_or_lt with rfl | hlt'
      · left; exact Metric.mem_ball_self one_pos
      · left; exact hV hz2 hlt'
    · right; exact hW hz3 hlt
  choose U hU hbdd using this
  obtain ⟨t, htcover⟩ := hs.elim_nhds_subcover U hU
  rw [← Set.inter_univ s, ← htcover, Set.inter_iUnion]
  exact isBounded_iUnion_of_finite fun ⟨i, _⟩ => hbdd i i.2

rcases s.eq_empty_or_nonempty with rfl | hne
  · simp
  · have : ∀ x ∈ s, ∃ t ∈ 𝓝[s] x, IsBounded (f '' t) := fun x _ => by
      have hrc := hf.right_continuous x
      have hll := hf.left_limit x
      obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hll
      have h1 : ∀ᶠ y in 𝓝[>] x, dist (f y) (f x) < 1 := by
        have := hrc.tendsto
        exact this (Metric.ball_mem_nhds (f x) one_pos)
      have h2 : ∀ᶠ y in 𝓝[<] x, dist (f y) l < 1 := by
        exact hl (Metric.ball_mem_nhds l one_pos)
      have hcl : ∀ᶠ y in 𝓝[≤] x, dist (f y) l < 1 ∨ y = x := by
        rw [nhdsWithin_Iic_eq_nhdsWithin_Iio_sup_pure]
        apply Filter.Eventually.filter_mono (Filter.sup_le_iff.mpr ⟨le_rfl, le_rfl⟩)
        rw [Filter.eventually_sup]
        exact ⟨h2.mono (fun y hy => Or.inl hy), by simp⟩
      have hright : ∀ᶠ y in 𝓝[≥] x, dist (f y) (f x) < 1 := by
        rw [nhdsWithin_Ici_eq_nhdsWithin_Ioi_sup_pure]
        rw [Filter.eventually_sup]
        exact ⟨h1, by simp⟩
      have : ∀ᶠ y in 𝓝 x, dist (f y) l < 1 ∨ dist (f y) (f x) < 1 := by
        rw [← nhdsWithin_Iic_union_nhdsWithin_Ioi_eq_nhds]
        rw [Filter.eventually_sup]
        constructor
        · exact hcl.mono (fun y hy => hy.elim Or.inl (fun h => Or.inr (by simp [h])))
        · exact h1.mono (fun y hy => Or.inr hy)
      obtain ⟨t, ht_nhds, ht_bdd⟩ := ⟨{y | dist (f y) l < 1 ∨ dist (f y) (f x) < 1},
        this, Metric.isBounded_ball.union Metric.isBounded_ball⟩
      refine ⟨t ∩ s, Filter.inter_mem (nhdsWithin_le_nhds ht_nhds) self_mem_nhdsWithin,
        ht_bdd.subset (Set.image_mono Set.inter_subset_left)⟩
    exact hs.isBounded_of_forall_mem this (fun _ ⟨_, hx, _⟩ => hx)

apply IsCompact.isBounded_image hs
  intro x _
  have hright := hf.right_continuous x
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf.left_limit x
  exact Filter.Tendsto.locallyBounded_image (hright.tendsto_nhdsWithin_insert_of_tendsto_nhdsWithin hl)

apply IsCompact.isBounded
  sorry

have hcont : ∀ x, ContinuousWithinAt f (Set.Ici x) x := fun x => by
    rw [← Set.Ioi_union_left, continuousWithinAt_union]
    exact ⟨hf.right_continuous x, continuousWithinAt_singleton⟩
  exact (hs.image_of_continuousOn (fun x _ => (hcont x).mono fun _ h => h.1)).isBounded

apply hs.isBounded_of_forall_mem
  intro x _
  have hrc := hf.right_continuous x
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf.left_limit x
  have h1 : ∀ᶠ y in 𝓝[Set.Ici x] x, dist (f y) (f x) < 1 := by
    have : ContinuousWithinAt f (Set.Ici x) x := by
      simp only [← Set.Ioi_union_left, continuousWithinAt_union]
      exact ⟨hrc, continuousWithinAt_singleton⟩
    exact this.tendsto (Metric.ball_mem_nhds (f x) one_pos)
  have h2 : ∀ᶠ y in 𝓝[Set.Iio x] x, dist (f y) l < 1 := by
    exact hl (Metric.ball_mem_nhds l one_pos)
  obtain ⟨u1, hu1m, hu1⟩ := h1.exists_mem
  obtain ⟨u2, hu2m, hu2⟩ := h2.exists_mem
  have hmem : (u1 ∩ Set.Ici x) ∪ (u2 ∩ Set.Iio x) ∈ 𝓝 x := by
    have : Set.Ici x ∪ Set.Iio x = Set.univ := Set.Ici_union_Iio
    rw [← Set.inter_univ (u1 ∩ Set.Ici x ∪ u2 ∩ Set.Iio x), ← this]
    apply Filter.inter_mem
    · exact Filter.union_mem_sup (nhdsWithin_le_nhds hu1m) (nhdsWithin_le_nhds hu2m)
    · exact Filter.univ_mem
  refine ⟨(u1 ∩ Set.Ici x) ∪ (u2 ∩ Set.Iio x), Filter.mem_of_superset hmem Set.inter_subset_left, 
         ?_, Set.inter_subset_left⟩
  apply Metric.isBounded_iff_subset_closedBall (f x).exists_forall_ge
  use f x, max 1 (dist l (f x) + 1)
  intro y hy
  simp only [Set.mem_image, Metric.mem_closedBall] at hy ⊢
  obtain ⟨z, hz, rfl⟩ := hy
  cases hz with
  | inl hz =>
    have := hu1 z hz
    calc dist (f z) (f x) < 1 := this
         _ ≤ max 1 (dist l (f x) + 1) := le_max_left _ _
  | inr hz =>
    have := hu2 z hz.1
    calc dist (f z) (f x) ≤ dist (f z) l + dist l (f x) := dist_triangle _ _ _
         _ < 1 + dist l (f x) := by linarith
         _ = dist l (f x) + 1 := by ring
         _ ≤ max 1 (dist l (f x) + 1) := le_max_right _ _

apply hs.isBounded_of_forall_mem
  intro x hx
  have hr := hf.right_continuous x
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf.left_limit x
  have h1 : ∃ U ∈ 𝓝[Set.Iio x] x, IsBounded (f '' U) := 
    ⟨_, self_mem_nhdsWithin, Metric.Tendsto.isBounded_range hl⟩
  have h2 : ∃ V ∈ 𝓝[Set.Ioi x] x, IsBounded (f '' V) := 
    ⟨_, self_mem_nhdsWithin, Metric.Tendsto.isBounded_range hr⟩
  obtain ⟨U, hU, hbU⟩ := h1
  obtain ⟨V, hV, hbV⟩ := h2
  refine ⟨(U ∪ {x} ∪ V) ∩ s, ?_, ?_⟩
  · apply inter_mem_nhdsWithin
    rw [← Set.Iio_union_Ici, ← Set.Ioi_insert]
    exact union_mem_sup (nhdsWithin_mono x Set.Iio_subset_Iic_self hU) 
      (nhdsWithin_mono x (Set.subset_insert _ _) hV)
  · refine (hbU.union ?_).union hbV |>.subset (Set.image_mono Set.inter_subset_left)
    exact isBounded_singleton
